intent: In DATA_DIR there is a 10x matrix triplet for one PBMC sample — files prefixed GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1. Run a standard Seurat workflow in R: load, QC, normalize, PCA, neighbors, clustering, UMAP, and FindAllMarkers; show me a UMAP and the top markers per cluster.

blocks.text: Good — I can see the data. There are actually 3 PBMC samples here (C1, C2, C4), but you asked for just the **GSM5746268** sample (the C1 one). Let me load the Seurat recipe and plan the workflow.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "seurat-scrna", "description": "Authoritative single-cell RNA-seq QC + clustering + cluster annotation with R/Seurat (v5).", "body": "scRNA-seq QC + clustering + annotation with R/Seurat v5 (standard PBMC3k workflow). Provision: ensure_capability('Seurat'), then library(Seurat). THE THREE CHOICES THAT DEFINE THE RESULT \u2014 surface them with present_plan before committing: (1) QC thresholds (subset cutoffs on nFeature_RNA and percent.mt); (2) number of PCs/dims (read off the ElbowPlot); (3) clustering resolution (FindClusters). Steps: ReadMtx -> CreateSeuratObject(min.cells=3,min.features=200) -> PercentageFeatureSet('^MT-') -> subset QC -> NormalizeData -> FindVariableFeatures -> ScaleData -> RunPCA -> FindNeighbors -> FindClusters -> RunUMAP -> JoinLayers -> FindAllMarkers. Load ggplot2 and dplyr explicitly; never library(tidyverse)."}

blocks.text: Now let me present a plan for the Seurat workflow on the GSM5746268 sample.

input.title: Seurat v5 QC → Clustering → UMAP + Markers (GSM5746268)
input.summary: Standard Seurat workflow: load 10x MTX triplet, QC (filter by nFeature and %MT), normalize, find variable genes, scale, PCA, neighbors, Leiden clustering, UMAP, and differential expression (FindAllMarkers). Return UMAP plot colored by cluster and top markers table.

steps.title: Load 10x matrix triplet → CreateSeuratObject
steps.description: Read MTX + barcodes + features for GSM5746268 sample with min.cells=3, min.features=200

steps.title: QC: Calculate mitochondrial % and filter
steps.description: Add percent.mt annotation; subset cells with nFeature_RNA ∈ [200,5000] and percent.mt < 20% (standard thresholds for PBMCs)

steps.title: PCA + Elbow inspection
steps.description: RunPCA; show ElbowPlot to decide number of PCs (typically 15-30)
expected_outputs: dims to use in downstream steps

steps.title: Neighbors + Leiden clustering + UMAP
expected_outputs: Seurat object with clusters and UMAP

steps.title: UMAP plot (clusters) and FindAllMarkers
steps.description: JoinLayers; FindAllMarkers(only.pos=TRUE, logfc.threshold=0.25); plot UMAP colored by cluster; extract top markers per cluster

assumptions: Loading GSM5746268 sample only (10x MTX triplet from DATA_DIR)
Mouse PBMC data: mitochondrial gene prefix is 'MT-'
QC filters: 200 ≤ nFeature_RNA ≤ 5000, percent.mt < 20% (standard PBMC thresholds)
PCA dims: will inspect ElbowPlot and use ~30 (common for PBMCs); can adjust if user requests
Clustering resolution: 0.5 (moderate; can vary to coarsen/refine clusters)
